2/3 of Japanese population are monthly active on X. And many post through anonymous accounts (inherited from 2chan days since 1999).

Analogy: millions of Roon's competing and self-evolving for the past 25 years. It's the frontier lab for posting.

I would expect that a lot of things that were old hat to experts, but completely inaccessible to most people, will go viral in the coming months.

Sure, anyone could have done those things before, but it required a lot of deep knowledge. Now the AI can make it happen by asking.

I stopped putting progress indicators in my code. I just have a codex session running and ask it "look at the input and output files and read the tmux pane, then give me an ETA estimate."

And then just "And now?" every now and then. https://t.co/aUwAfyjvFW

📢GaussianGPT: autoregressive 3D Gaussian scene generation.

We introduce a GPT-style model that directly generates 3D Gaussian scenes, token by token, in a series of small, discrete decision steps. Generation, completion, and large-scale outpainting in a single pipeline.
